message:
feat(3d): Integrate WASM functional group detection in structure worker

Adds detectFunctionalGroupsWasm() to leverage the new WASM-accelerated
functional group detection for large protein structures.

**Integration details:**
- Converts AtomRecord[] to flat Float32Array positions for WASM
- Converts element symbols to single-char string for WASM
- Converts Bond[] to flat Uint32Array [a0, b0, a1, b1, ...]
- Parses FunctionalGroupResult back to SerializedFunctionalGroup[]
- Properly frees WASM memory after extraction

**Result parsing:**
- Aromatic rings: extracts indices based on ring_sizes array
- Disulfide bonds: extracts pairs from disulfide_pairs array
- Phosphate groups: parses variable-length phosphate_data format

Falls back to JavaScript implementation when WASM module unavailable.
Part of phage_explorer-qzxz.2 (WASM parser prototype).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
